name: Applesauce-Raisin Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the egg. Add oil, yogurt, brown sugar, applesauce, vanilla and lemon/orange rind. Mix well.
2. In another bowl, stir together raisins, flour, bran, baking powder, cinnamon, ginger and nutmeg. Add to wet ingredients and mix only until combined.
3. Turn into a lightly greased (or wax-paper lined) 8-inch square cake pan. Lightly press almonds into the top of the batter.
4. Bake in a 350°F oven for 45 minutes or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean. (Squares will be moist.) Let cool, then cut into squares. Makes 25 small squares, each about 1 1/2 inches.
Per square: 88 cal, 3 g fat, 11 mg cholesterol, 10 mg sodium, 2 g protein, 14 g carbohydrate, 1 1/2 fruit choice, 1/2 fat
